summary: Successfully tested enhanced recurrence features for Hospital Meeting App. All backend API tests passed (17/17). All frontend UI tests passed including: 'Meeting Start Date' label, Weekly day selector (7 days), Monthly day selector (1-31), Monthly on... pattern, Recurrence End Date field visibility, and comprehensive frontend validation.
seed_data_creation: Test meetings created during testing with 'TEST_' prefix. E2E test meeting 'E2E Test: Weekly Tuesday Meeting' (id: f9b2fb9b-83c0-4595-9bea-ef2ad2666765) created and verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced recurrence features fully tested and working. Features include: 1) Weekly recurrence with day_of_week selection (Monday-Sunday), 2) Monthly recurrence with day_of_month selection (1-31), 3) Monthly on... pattern with week_of_month and day_of_week, 4) Mandatory recurrence_end_date for all recurring types with validation, 5) 'Meeting Start Date' label. All CRUD operations work correctly with data persistence verified.

backend_api.POST /api/meetings with recurrence_day_o: PASS - saves correctly for monthly recurrence
backend_api.POST /api/meetings with recurrence_end_d: PASS - persists for all recurring types
backend_api.POST /api/meetings with monthly_on patte: PASS - week_of_month and day_of_week combinations work
backend_api.GET /api/meetings/:id persistence: PASS - all recurrence fields persist in MongoDB

frontend_ui.E2E: Weekly meeting creation: PASS - meeting created with correct data

validation.Weekly without day selection: PASS - shows 'Please select a day of the week for weekly recurrence'
validation.Monthly without day selection: PASS - shows 'Please select a day of the month for monthly recurrence'
validation.Recurring without end date: PASS - shows 'Please select an end date for recurring meetings'
validation.End date before start date: PASS - shows 'Recurrence end date must be after the meeting start date'
